title: OperatorInferenceGammaV0
description: Minimal evaluation context Γ for operator IR inference (A2). Extends with handles, policyBindings, eval_revision in V1+.

irSchemaVersion.description: IR document schema this Γ was built for.

handles.description: Optional resolved handle map (BIND targets). V0 may be empty.

policyBindings.description: Optional policy bundle bindings for EVAL. V0 may be empty.

cidAllocPolicy.description: Optional cid allocation policy id when EMIT allocates (V1+).
